name: GLM-4.7

overview: GLM-4.7 is a large language model from Z.ai (Zhipu / GLM), part of the GLM (flagship) line. Released 2025-12-22. Z.ai's frontier flagship large language model line, built for reasoning, agentic workflows and long-horizon coding, with open weights.
What's notable in this version: Open-sourced iteration with stronger coding, complex reasoning and more stable agentic / tool-use behaviour over long multi-step tasks.
